extracted.full_content:
Nagavenkatasivagopi Somana

Interested 

Nidhi Rajput

Talent Acquisition Specialist

Hiring for contractual position of Senior AI Engineer (LLM / RAG / Agents) 3-5 Years 
Location Remote 
Pls share 9667627371
Follow for more position Nidhi Rajput

Senior AI Engineer (LLM / RAG / Agents)
📍 Remote | Contract
🕒 4 Hours EST Overlap
👨‍💻 Experience: 2–4 Years
Job Summary:
We are looking for a hands-on AI Engineer to build scalable, production-ready AI systems using LLMs, RAG pipelines, and agent-based architectures. The role involves designing intelligent workflows, optimizing performance, and ensuring reliability, observability, and cost efficiency.
Key Responsibilities:
Build and optimize LLM-based agents (planner, router, intent systems)
Develop RAG pipelines with embeddings, retrieval & reranking
Tune prompts, routing logic, and model performance
Implement evaluation metrics (accuracy, latency, quality)
Ensure observability (logs, traces, cost tracking)
Maintain secure, scalable APIs and CI/CD pipelines
Required Skills:
Strong experience with LLMs, RAG, and AI systems
Knowledge of vector databases (Pinecone, Weaviate, etc.)
Proficiency in Python or Node.js
Experience with APIs, system design, and backend development
Understanding of observability, security, and performance optimization
Good to Have:
Knowledge graphs, OpenTelemetry, Kubernetes
A/B testing, evaluation frameworks, and cost optimization
If you want, I can make an even shorter 2–3 line WhatsApp/LinkedIn version for quick hiring posts.

Sonali Girhe

Senior Human Resources Consultant || Client Relations || Team Effectiveness || Succession Planning || Vendor management || HR Generalist || Team Handling @Follex Technology

#Hiring #AIMLengineer #Remote
Job Title: AI/ML Engineer  
– LLM Platform & Model Management (AWS/GCP) 
Experience: +5 Years Location: Remote (U.S. Working Hours)   ​
Contract Duration: 3–6 months​
Work Timing: 8 AM – 4 PM EST​
Start Timeline: Within 2 weeks​
Compensation: 1 LPM including 2 % TDS(Based on skills & experience) 
Can apply to sonali.girhe@follextechnology.com

Job Description  
Overview We are looking for an experienced AI/ML Engineer with 
strong expertise in LLM platforms, model deployment, and cloud-based ML 
infrastructure. 
 The ideal candidate will have hands-on experience with model hosting, versioning, and inference workflows across both AWS and GCP, with a focus on migrating and managing workloads between Amazon SageMaker and Google Vertex AI 
. You will also work extensively with LLM APIs, multi-model routing systems, and AI-driven document processing pipelines. 

Key Responsibilities Model Management & Deployment 
 ● Design, deploy, and manage ML models using Amazon SageMaker 
 ● Lead migration of ML workloads from Google Vertex AI to AWS environments 
 ● Implement model versioning, monitoring, and scalable inference pipelines 
 ● Optimize model performance for both real-time and batch processing use cases LLM 
Integration & Optimization 
 ● Integrate and manage LLM APIs such as Google Gemini and models available via Amazon Bedrock (Claude, Llama, Titan) 
 ● Develop multi-model routing strategies, fallback mechanisms, and cost optimization workflows 
 ● Conduct benchmarking and evaluation across models based on accuracy, latency, and cost API Gateway & LiteLLM Implementation 
 ● Deploy and configure LiteLLM as a centralized interface for multiple LLM providers 
 ● Enable seamless switching between models and providers through unified APIs  
● Integrate enterprise applications with LiteLLM for scalable AI consumption Cloud Infrastructure & Security 
 ● Deploy containerized AI services using Amazon ECS Fargate  
● Manage secure access control using AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM)  
● Build and maintain scalable, secure, and production-ready AI infrastructure Document Processing & AI Workflows  
● Develop AI-driven document processing pipelines leveraging LLM capabilities  
● Evaluate and fine-tune models for document extraction, summarization, and classification  
● Ensure high performance and cost-efficiency in document-centric AI solutions 
Required Qualifications  
● Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science
 ● 5+ years of experience in AI/ML, and MLOp. 
 ● Strong hands-on experience with Amazon SageMaker and Google Vertex AI  
● Experience working with LLM APIs and foundation models  
● Proficiency in deploying scalable services using containerization technologies 
 ● Strong understanding of cloud security and access management principles Key Skills 
● MLOps & LLMOps 
 ● Model Deployment & Versioning  
● API Integration & Gateway Design  
● Cloud Computing (AWS, GCP) 
 ● Containerization & Microservices
